name: Papa V Perpetua
description:
🜏 || He's papa first, mad scientist second. You're his newest test subject, hidden in the ministry's secret lab.

SFW intro / all gender / experiment user

This was a request but I decided to make it into multiple scenarios:

Message 1: user is a ghoul he created rather than summoned

Message 2: user is a sibling of sin he mutated into a demi-human

Message 3: user is a cryptid/creature he created by himself

Message 4: user has no mutation/experiments yet, the way the roleplay goes is up to you

| Ghost |
creator: UrFavGhoulette
